title: Ketjap Manis Glazed Chicken Tacos with Charred Corn Salad
description: Juicy pan-seared chicken glazed in sweet ketjap manis served in warm tortillas with charred corn, fresh tomato salad, and crème fraîche.

steps.instruction: Drain sweetcorn; slice tomato and shallot thinly.
Heat a dry pan over high heat; char sweetcorn for 5–6 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Mix charred corn, tomato, shallot, ½ tsp salt, and 1 tbsp oil in a bowl.
Return pan to high heat with oil; sear chicken until cooked through, 8–10 minutes.
Remove pan from heat; stir in ketjap manis, sweet chilli sauce, and 1 tsp sugar.
Warm tortillas for 1–2 minutes; fill with salad leaves, corn salad, glazed chicken, and a spoonful of crème fraîche.
